mapper.select: select * from `sys_user` where role = #{role} order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `sys_user`(username, password, name, role, student_no, teacher_no, college, major, class_name, status, avatar, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{role}, #{studentNo}, #{teacherNo}, #{college}, #{major}, #{className}, #{status}, #{avatar}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
